directions_tried.name: Balaban RG program precision map
directions_tried.outcome: Complete 14-paper map. UV stability on T4. Two-tier, 5-gap structure.

directions_tried.name: Constructive QFT 2D/3D vs 4D failure modes
directions_tried.outcome: 8 constructions cataloged. 3 specific 4D failure modes. UV solved, difficulty entirely IR.

directions_tried.name: SU(2) lattice gauge theory computation
directions_tried.outcome: Working MC simulation. Confinement confirmed, string tension measured at all β.

directions_tried.name: Lattice-continuum gap analysis
directions_tried.outcome: 7-step gap. Adhikari-Cao 2025. Chatterjee school. Finite→continuous is key bottleneck.

directions_tried.name: Finite group approximation of SU(2) + Adhikari-Cao bound analysis
directions_tried.outcome: 2I matches SU(2) <0.5%. Adhikari-Cao bounds 57-69x vacuous (corrected). β_min diverges.

directions_tried.name: Modern rigorous frontier deep dive
directions_tried.outcome: 4-layer obstruction in Adhikari-Cao. All structural for that approach. 20-50+ year problem.

directions_tried.name: Novelty search for finite group results
directions_tried.outcome: Convergence rates APPEAR NOVEL (downgraded to qualitative after adversarial review). β_c known since 1980.

directions_tried.name: Obstruction atlas synthesis
directions_tried.outcome: 9-approach atlas. 5 bottleneck theorems. RG + Bakry-Émery recommended as most promising path.

directions_tried.name: Adversarial review of novel claims
directions_tried.outcome: Found Δ_G error (strengthens AC claim 4x). Convergence rate downgraded. Four-layer barrier moderated.

explorations_completed.key_finding: UV stability on T4. Two-tier, 5-gap structure.
Confinement confirmed. σ>0 at all β.
Convergence rates appear novel. β_c known since 1980.
Found Δ_G error (strengthens claim). Convergence rate downgraded.
